data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Refund routing back to original sources', but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for refund routing, yet there is no evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates how refunds are processed back to the original payment sources. This indicates a gap in the evidence regarding the requirement, as there is no explicit confirmation of the refund routing process being validated.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of refund routing back to original sources.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify refund routing functionality.
